name: terminal-manager
description: A cross-platform multi-terminal manager built with Electron
author: Terminal Manager

scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:node && npm run typecheck:web
scripts.package:current: npm run prepare:node-pty && npm run build && electron-builder build --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.package:dir: npm run prepare:node-pty && npm run build && electron-builder build --dir --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.package:win: npm run prepare:node-pty && npm run build && electron-builder build --win --x64 --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.package:mac: npm run prepare:node-pty && npm run build && electron-builder build --mac --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.package:mac:x64: npm run prepare:node-pty && npm run build && electron-builder build --mac --x64 --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.package:mac:arm64: npm run prepare:node-pty && npm run build && electron-builder build --mac --arm64 --config electron-builder.yml
